# Temporary Files Archive

This folder contains archived markdown files and debug outputs that may be needed for creating certain bots or for reference purposes.

## Archived Report Files

| File | Description | Original Location |
|------|-------------|-------------------|
| `detailed-test-comparison-report.md` | Old detailed comparison report | Project root |
| `field-comparison-report.md` | Old field comparison report | Project root |
| `test-comparison-report.md` | Old test comparison report | Project root |
| `DYNAMIC_MIGRATION_PROMPT_UPDATE_SUMMARY.md` | Migration prompt update summary | Project root |
| `MIGRATION_CROSSCHECK_REPORT.md` | Migration crosscheck report | Project root |
| `test-comparison-gaps.json` | Old test comparison gaps JSON | Project root |

## Debug Files

| File | Description | Original Location |
|------|-------------|-------------------|
| `debug.txt` - `debug8.txt` | Script debugging outputs | flow_reports/ |
| `debug_flow.txt` | Flow parsing debug output | flow_reports/ |
| `flow_check.txt` | Flow testcases check | flow_reports/ |
| `test_result.txt` | Test result output | flow_reports/ |

## Usage

These files are preserved for:
1. Reference when creating automation bots
2. Historical comparison of migration progress
3. Debugging and troubleshooting purposes

## Note

Do not delete these files without confirming they are no longer needed for bot creation.
